repeated_spans.phrase: when the first physical test came his arms were too tired to hold his weapon steady he had courage enough what he lacked was the strength that comes only from consistent preparation he eventually learned this but he lost months he could not recover do not make the same mistake strengthen yourself before the battle not during it
years ago a young man from a farming village enlisted to be a soldier he arrived at the barracks with
but his body was entirely unprepared when the first long march came he fell behind
a weak spirit cannot stand against the pressure of life this is
decide today that you will be strong
before it is a feeling decide today

illustration_echo.note: 6+ word overlap between time-marker illustration paragraphs

key_statement_duplicates.statement_a: You cannot have victory unless you first decide to be strong.
key_statement_duplicates.statement_b: Unless you decide to be strong, you cannot have victory.

refrain_overuse.phrase: Strength is a decision before it is a feeling.
